summary: FREE11 Phase 1-6 E2E verification: All 48 backend platform tests PASS. All Dashboard new components (OnboardingChecklist, FirstPredictionBanner) render correctly. All V2 sub-route endpoints respond 200. Security headers, pagination, and admin controls verified.

frontend_component_results.Login page renders (email+password): PASS - data-testid email-input and password-input visible
frontend_component_results.first-prediction-banner: PASS - visible for user with 0 predictions
frontend_component_results.dismiss-onboarding-btn: PASS - visible and dismisses checklist on click
frontend_component_results.first-prediction-cta: PASS - visible, shows live match text (PREDICT CAY vs SUR)

critical_code_review_comments: FirstPredictionBanner CTA navigation: when liveMatch is null, navigates to /match-centre; when liveMatch present, navigates to /match/{match_id}. Both paths are correct.
OnboardingChecklist uses sessionStorage for dismiss — correct ephemeral behavior; resets on tab close.

Rate limiter AUTH_LIMIT=5/min: Playwright automation intermittently hits rate limit when running 3+ login sequences within 60s window. This is expected production behavior. Testing note: use press_sequentially (not fill or keyboard.type) to reliably fill React-controlled inputs in this app.
v2_routes.py refactoring is clean — 35-line aggregator correctly imports 5 domain files. All domain routers registered and responding.
Pagination shape for /api/products and /api/coins/transactions is correct: {items_key: [], total: N, skip: N, limit: N}.
seed_data_creation: TEST_PROD_CLEANUP product created and deleted during test_products_create_admin_succeeds
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1-6 improvements verified. Key findings: (1) Dashboard OnboardingChecklist and FirstPredictionBanner both render correctly with correct data-testid attributes. (2) All V2 sub-router endpoints respond. (3) Pagination works for products and transactions. (4) Security headers X-Request-ID and X-Response-Time present on all responses. (5) Rate limiter (5 auth/min) still active - use press_sequentially for Playwright form fills. Test suite: /app/backend/tests/test_platform_v2.py (48 tests).
mocked_apis: ONDC Router, Zepto, Xoxoday, Amazon, Flipkart providers are all MOCKED as per design. /api/v2/router/settle, /api/v2/vouchers/redeem, and /api/v2/redeem (Xoxoday/Reloadly INR) use mock responses.
